subject: [PATCH 12/19] nfsd: add fh_want_write() for early-verified SETATTR in nfsd_proc_setattr()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a call to fh_want_write() in the nfsd_proc_setattr() function, which is necessary because the early verification of SETATTR causes the mount write reference to be skipped. The missing call was introduced by a previous change that disabled an NFSv2 timestamp workaround for NFSv3+. This patch ensures that notify_change() runs with a valid mount write reference.
